user.title: Select ESPHome Radar Sensors
user.description: Found {sensor_count} ESPHome radar sensors. Select at least one to add to the fusion.

configure_sensors.title: Configure Sensor Positions
configure_sensors.description: Configure position and rotation for {sensor_count} sensor(s): {sensors_list}

set_timeout.title: Set Target Timeout
set_timeout.description: Configure how long stale targets stay in cache before removal ({min_timeout}-{max_timeout} seconds, default: {default_timeout}s)

configure_zones.title: Define Zones and Blockzones
configure_zones.description: Define detection zones and blockzones using YAML

error.invalid_timeout_range: Target timeout must be between 1 and 60 seconds
error.at_least_one_sensor: Please select at least one sensor
